tagline: AI-Powered Outreach Platform for SEO Backlink Discovery and Campaign Management

challenge.headline: Manual outreach limits scale and efficiency
challenge.description: SEO professionals juggled multiple tools and repetitive processes while trying to execute campaigns at scale. Maintaining consistency and tracking progress across multiple initiatives made it nearly impossible to grow efficiently.

result.headline: Launched on web and mobile with 99+ users
result.quote: By simplifying workflows and reducing manual effort, Backlink Brain supports improved productivity and enables users to scale their activities with greater confidence.
